utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all five of these items appear. Each one includes both coverage details and cost information as required by the format. Health coverage specifies type and cost; property coverage specifies what is covered and cost; travel coverage specifies coverage scope and cost; additional services lists enhancements and their cost; total budget provides monthly and annual breakdown. Therefore, all 5 items are fully specified according to the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final plan selects LifeFirst as the provider for all three major coverage categories. To map these choices, we locate the corresponding LifeFirst plans in the ground-truth ratings. For health coverage, the plan includes both physical and mental health under LifeFirst Standard Plan, so we combine the ratings from both physical_health (rating 9) and mental_health (rating 4). For property coverage, the corresponding plan is LifeFirst Standard Coverage with a rating of 9. For travel coverage, the matching plan is LifeFirst Standard Plan under travel_insurance with a rating of 9. The additional services listed (telemedicine, gym reimbursement, family therapy, 24/7 support) correspond to specific enhancement services. Telemedicine Services has a rating of 10, Gym Membership Reimbursement has a rating of 2, Family Therapy Coverage has a rating of 1, and 24/7 crisis support aligns with Emergency Mental Health Care, which has a rating of 6.
